summary: Website/App project aiming to generate $100,000 in revenue
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Professional marketplace hero banner with abstract financial growth imagery in dark theme with gold accents (hero-banner.dim_1200x400.png)
- Minimalist currency or transaction icon for dashboard (transaction-icon.dim_128x128.png)

existing_features.title: Create a marketplace platform that connects buyers and sellers with transaction capabilities
Implement user authentication system using Internet Identity for secure access
Build a product listing system where sellers can create listings with title, description, price, and category
Implement a payment processing system that handles transactions between buyers and sellers with platform commission tracking
Create a revenue dashboard showing total platform earnings, transaction volume, and growth metrics
Design a modern, professional interface using a sophisticated dark theme with gold and emerald green accents that conveys trust and premium value
